theme: ARCHETYPE 4: SWISS & HIGH-CONTRAST + Green Official Theme

visual_enhancers.shadows: Use crisp, semi-transparent shadows. e.g., shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(22,101,52,0.08)]
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border on cards and tables for technical/bureaucratic precision.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-md (6px) to rounded-lg (8px) for a structured, formal feel without being too rigid.

component_guidelines.buttons: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded (rounded-md). High contrast on hover. Include transition-colors duration-200.
component_guidelines.forms: Inputs must have clear borders and a very subtle focus ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20). Labels must be bold and clear.
component_guidelines.tables: Data-dense layout. Use py-2 px-3 for cells. Alternating row colors (bg-muted/30) can be used for readability.
component_guidelines.cards: Flat solid background with 1px border. No heavy shadows. Use for dashboard metric summaries.
component_guidelines.dialogs: Use for quick actions like 'Checkout Visitor' or 'View Visitor Details' to keep context.
component_guidelines.toasts: Use 'sonner' for all success/error notifications (e.g., check-in successful).

layouts.dashboard: Sidebar navigation (w-64) on desktop, collapsed on mobile. Main content area with max-w-7xl constraint and generous padding (p-6 to p-8).
layouts.grid: Use 'bento' grid principles for the dashboard summary. Example: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 for top metrics.
layouts.login: Split screen layout. Left side: High-quality abstract green building background with a dark overlay. Right side: Clean, centered login form with Google and JWT options.

motion.hover_states: Buttons and list items must have distinct hover states (darker shade or slight background shift).
motion.transitions: Use transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out for interactive elements. Exclude transform from universal transitions.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against the primary green meets at least 4.5:1 contrast. Use pure white for text on primary buttons.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must show a clear focus ring for keyboard navigation.
accessibility.aria: Use proper aria-labels for icon-only buttons.

media.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for consistency (user, log-in, check-circle, clock, map-pin, users, file-text).

login_background.description: Modern hallway with sunlight, potted plants, and a long counter. Use on the left half of the login screen with a subtle dark green overlay.

logo_placeholder.description: Abstract green object. Use as a placeholder for the National Bureau of Statistics logo.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='visitor-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a Front Desk Visitors Register for the National Bureau of Statistics.
Ensure all `.js` components use modern React functional patterns. (Do not output .tsx files).
Install and use `lucide-react` for icons and `sonner` for toast notifications.
The UI must feel authoritative, clean, and data-dense (Admin Panel context).
Use a specific dark green tone (primary) for the main theme to represent the national statistical office.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Work Sans' or a similar geometric sans for headings, and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body data.
Never use `transition: all`. Target specific properties like `transition-colors`.
Do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` to the global CSS. Everything should be left-aligned by default for readability.
Do not use fully transparent backgrounds for interactive dropdowns or sticky headers.
Include 'data-testid' on all buttons, links, and forms.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
Avoid generic centered layouts and simplistic gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
Ensure all interactive and key informational elements have 'data-testid'.
